slides.headline:
These are upfront licensing fees.
Not royalties. Not splits. Not "exposure."
slides.lede: You also earn performance royalties every time the content airs.

slides.headline:
Streaming: fractions of a cent per play.
Sync: thousands, once, yours.
The market exists.
slides.lede:
The demand is real.
What's missing is the infrastructure connecting African composers to it. · Save this. Then ask yourself: is your music in the room?

slides.headline: Open briefs. Every Tuesday.
slides.lede: Composers: apply once, get matched for life. Supervisors: shortlist in 48h.
